name: Brass Shell Hand Towel Holder with Hinge - Threshold™
description:
Give your bathroom decor an elegant update with the Brass Shell Hand Towel Holder with Hinge from Threshold™. Designed in the shape of a shell, this towel holder opens up to hold a hand towel, making it an amazing addition to your bath space. This hand towel holder is made of brass-finish metal to add a vintage vibe to your bathroom decor.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
